title: Self Stirring Mug, Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug, 380ml Stainless Steel Self Mixing Coffee Cup with Lid, Electric Mixing Mug, Rotating Home Office Travel Stirring Cup for Coffee/Milk (White)
description:
About this item
【Safe Stainless Material】This stirring mug is made of high-quality 304 stainless steel material which is sturdy, no easy to break and durable, reused and can be used for a long time.
【350ML Capacity & Portable】This stirring mug capacity of 380ml, enough to meet your daily needs, the size is 13.5 x 9cm, with a handle design, making it easy to carry.
【Non-Eccentric Stirring】This magnetic stirring mug is designed with a fixed rotor which is stable and won't move during adding boiling water. And when the magnetic stirring mug rotates for stirring coffee, the rotor will not be off-center causing accidental feeding.
【Easy to Operate and Clean】This stirring cup starts automatically with the push of a button, making it easy to use. It is also very easy to clean. Simply wash it with tap water. (Please note: Hand wash only, not dishwasher or microwave)
【Wide Application】The mixing cup with lid allows you to take your drinks from the kitchen to the living room, bedroom, car, office, gym, school and more. It is great for coffee, tea, hot chocolate, milk, protein shakes, lemonade, etc.
